daily.today_energy: Your intuition is hitting different today, Scorpio. Trust those gut feelings—they're basically your internal GPS pointing you toward what actually matters. The universe is whispering, and you're finally listening.
daily.love: Whether you're coupled up or flying solo, there's this magnetic pull happening. Someone might be thinking about you, or you're about to realize what you actually want. Either way, your authenticity is your superpower rn.
daily.career: Your creative energy is peaking, and people are noticing. This is the moment to pitch that idea you've been sitting on or take a different angle on your current projects. Your perspective hits different when you lean into it.
daily.health: Your body's asking for some real rest—not just scrolling in bed. Movement that feels good (not forced) and hydration are your best friends today. Check in with yourself about what you actually need versus what you think you should do.

weekly.overview: This week's cosmic energy is giving you permission to shed what no longer serves. Mars is pushing you toward authenticity, so trust your gut when something feels off. Expect clarity by midweek that changes your whole perspective.
weekly.love: Venus is whispering softly this week—if you're coupled up, it's time for real talk. Single? Someone intriguing might slide into your orbit, but don't rush. Your vibe is magnetic rn, so just exist and let things unfold naturally.
weekly.career: Your ideas are sharper than usual, and people are actually listening. This is your moment to pitch that thing you've been sitting on. Don't overthink it—your instincts are literally your superpower right now.
weekly.health: Your energy is asking you to slow down and actually rest, not just doom-scroll. Try something grounding this week—walks, journaling, whatever feels like a reset. Your nervous system will thank you for the pause.
